principle: A coarse comparator must never decide a discrete Vedic classification near a cusp. Within a guard band, escalate to CLASS_C transition-time certification.

guardBands.rationale: 0.025 deg = 90 arcsec >= the secondary comparator (Astronomy Engine) design accuracy, so its ~1' error can never flip a discrete class inside the band.

certification.method: transition-time comparison via deterministic bisection root-finding (transition-solver.ts / Python oracle)
